body:
Hey, thanks for using react-instantsearch in react-native. We love to find people trying our library in less obvious platforms. However, to create an easy to reproduce 

What I notice is that you have the `InstantSearch` variable twice. Once as the class, and once imported, I think that this is already a thing that is causing errors when I try to reproduce your setup. 

I'm wondering if you can try https://sketch.expo.io/ to make an easily reproducible issue?
Thx! I´ll try https://sketch.expo.io/ an report back

Maybe you can mount the virtual widgets only if the modal is not shown?

Also I will close this as we moved the react-instantsearch repo here https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch. 

Reopen the issue there if it's still not working :)
